description: Binance CEO discusses the evolution of crypto regulation and adoption, emphasizing the need for a regulatory framework to enhance credibility and user trust. He highlights the importance of collaboration with global regulators and the role of major financial institutions in driving crypto adoption.
topic_summary: The CEO of Binance shares insights on crypto adoption and regulation, noting that only 5% of the global population is currently engaged with crypto. He expresses optimism about future growth driven by regulatory clarity and institutional involvement [t=144.29].
